message:
refactor(workflows): extract StepResult and WaitCondition to step_results.rs [ft-c45am]

Strangler fig extraction: move StepResult, WaitCondition, and TextMatch
(381 lines) from workflows/mod.rs into a dedicated submodule. Private
methods to_wait_matcher() and description() on TextMatch become pub(super).

workflows/mod.rs: 21,350 → 20,980 lines (-370 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
